records.title: add document and steps for stop session.
records.summary: Stopping a session terminates its running compute while preserving the persistent filesystem volume. Unlike deleting a session, the session is retained and can be resumed by a later invocation. Stopping a session that's already stopped succeeds without error.
records.change_summary: Stopping a session terminates its running compute while preserving the persistent filesystem volume. Unlike deleting a session, the session is retained and can be resumed by a later invocation. Stopping a session that's already stopped succeeds without error.

records.title: Add requirement for ACRs enabling azureADAuthenticationAsArmPolicy for Foundry Hosted Agent image ac
Update REST API reference in deployment instructions
records.summary: Use the REST API for direct HTTP-based deployments or custom tooling. The sections below walk through a first deployment in order: set up variables, build a zip, create the agent, poll until active, and invoke it. Update.
records.change_summary: Use the REST API for direct HTTP-based deployments or custom tooling. The sections below walk through a first deployment in order: set up variables, build a zip, create the agent, poll until active, and invoke it. Update.
